textByHashes.acb87be2b4c352d8282a1bfd61fb450cc1ac4f48: Aha, I see my reputation precedes me. Yes, I am the renowned hunter and explorer Nickolaus. You've arrived just in time to witness a very momentous occasion, for I have just discovered the nest of a giant
textByHashes.4d6b04562793f05d53df995fdf1ee5eb788bb356: eagle. And a most amazing discovery it is too, even if I do say so myself.
textByHashes.71ca6a5ba838eb9400b46232bb694b50f7f7aa0f: Ah yes, he sent me to find a ferret. A trivial task, and one which pales in comparison compared to this momentous discovery. I'm sure he can wait.
textByHashes.678af87d8517f135616bc753f9d7b4149b4773fc: Well I think trapped is quite a negative way of looking at it.
textByHashes.a36db1210a74d2687d78e1d110d695dbaf1c24eb: I will admit however that getting out of here may be a little tricky. I did have a plan, but unfortunately it didn't involve being stuck in this nest.
textByHashes.53a96c07a27acb0205ee15ac2a60951889395c9d: Actually I believe you could. I need to somehow trick the eagles into thinking I'm one of them. Could you fashion some sort of disguise for me?
textByHashes.201e7c1099b9bef4295e62a79bdb94b21c5f4800: Well, you could go and speak to the fancy dress shop owner in Varrock. He can make anything if you give him the right materials. In fact you should probably get a couple of disguises, one for each of us.
textByHashes.e96ad9f032a7a07a9c8e6ad14f6eb1451ad93ce2: Very true, and certainly an opportunity I wouldn't want to miss.
textByHashes.3dd346732c23ef7d05932af1d3d9bb2ef9f7f756: It's always a pleasure to discuss my discoveries.
textByHashes.f6e0d1045c2c49485c498879fc89a1c3a33e6610: How very kind of you. But Nickolaus Farrick never needs rescuing. I may apparently be trapped in a giant eagle's nest, but it is all a cunning ruse to put the beast at ease.
textByHashes.4e8f7c1077b51db3198a7d0b9792775a598b7bff: Oh many people believe so, yes, but my relentless exploration has paid off once again, for I stand now in the nest of such a supposedly mythical creature.
textByHashes.e84fd661522fad9a0fc37848efec6ba1c2c2b990: Through unfaltering dedication, attention to detail, oh, and I suppose there's the minor point that I got carried here by an eagle.
textByHashes.1446dd105a9689a9c6eb10a538d0c6e2e881e1e8: So it might appear to an amateur yes, and, well, I may have been a little lucky, but it's still a remarkable discovery don't you think?
textByHashes.503e14e61d642db906abe7609d562aef4d865c40: Well, there's all sorts to do. I need to observe its behaviour patterns and document its feeding habits. The discovery is only just the beginning you know.
textByHashes.625777119e847f14d8e1cb7b753ab1833700d2a6: Wonderfully, these giant eagles are simply magnificent creatures. I absolutely must see about getting one as a pet.
textByHashes.70627e95d6c138dcb2fa8899ca63fba8cc2a9a45: Quite possibly, quite possibly, but I haven't found a creature I couldn't tame yet.
textByHashes.3c614b836e0cd92dddcdad6665702c233266038c: Wonderfully thank you, although I am still having just a little trouble convincing them to let me leave.
textByHashes.4bb7493f7284525821128ed95cda07303c1aff9e: I don't suppose you've managed to get that disguise I asked for yet?
textByHashes.af9a1afbb60d4d525c793e625468469664c81bc1: Well like I said, the Varrock fancy dress shop is a good bet if you have the materials, and there are plenty of feathers around here.
textByHashes.8df6da5740701a5b51b3c574c738cb9e69b9c562: And while you're working on that, I'll get back to studying these incredible winged wonders.
textByHashes.b49d060c661e44ee293d7f75a28368249a182746: Well bring it over here then. It's not much use to me over there.
textByHashes.dab88fd8e6c44502578eaee77119ea92d3d15e01: What's this, a young hatchling? Oh no, I hope it doesn't think I'm its dinner!
textByHashes.7ee6788ca29e4d4fe32a4924da2cf517c52b6aff: You're sure...you're sure you're not going to eat me?
textByHashes.90755186f8309e69f97bab87a2975814fba71f3b: Wow, that really is a very convincing disguise. Have you got one for me too?
textByHashes.0ee58b642b9b78ab2bd61751d9ae51be3e256d23: Excellent, now there is no way the eagle will be able to tell me from one of its own.
textByHashes.60f6bb0df339ff2e9f93c957206fa1081c4609d4: Now you run off, and I'll meet you back down at the camp site.
textByHashes.cbe2a793bbb03e4f81b234b989408b6f59371f77: Calm down. You must realise I can't leave just like that, this is far too amazing an opportunity. Just go down to the camp site and I'll meet you there.
textByHashes.2c0b424635129388cae95b48e28b2b60a640c915: : Ah, hello again. Can I help at all?
textByHashes.3970a50954540dce9e674b33b52065d9d0409216: I'll do better than that. I'll teach you how to capture one yourself.
textByHashes.dff7513c74c97762b89835378a3686daaf0bdd53: Come with me and I'll show you.
textByHashes.d64679031b6719591a4493aaa7f5dcde3a9e7aab: Did I mention we wait quietly?
textByHashes.08dfa43c05e64eb4ddda6173aac7e54b947f7211: Ha ha, there you go! One gift-wrapped ferret ready for delivery.
textByHashes.b248d821793535136f9a7bb870a5c3d477b72d82: See, it's all just a matter of patience.
textByHashes.e922795de68b0abb7a9e9ffb68cbd43fdd8b4521: Ah you don't get out of it that easily. When you've got the time come back and see me.
textByHashes.54725af85aee467b301f92d141033ed651a247d3: Ah wonderfully. They're actually most cooperative creatures once they get used to you. With some rope I'm sure you could find some way to tame them... maybe even fly on them.
textByHashes.2bf3c1cb9050edabbc61c2d67dd12989b93a6f29: No such luck I'm afraid, but I'm sure I'll make another discovery soon enough. I always seem to.
textByHashes.4fc6fe6aa99769c41599902ebfd75fde317e994a: Ah, hello again. Can I help at all?
